Records.authors: Frellesvig, Hjalte, Gasparotto, Federico, Laporta, Stefano, Mandal, Manoj K., Mastrolia, Pierpaolo, Mattiazzi, Luca, Mizera, Sebastian
Records.description: Massless two-loop sunrise (banana) diagram, with three massless propagators and one ISP z=k2^2. The 1-form omega from the standard Baikov representation has a single master on the maximal cut. The reduction I_{1,1,1;-1} = (s/3) I_{1,1,1;0} is obtained in the monomial basis via intersection numbers, in agreement with LiteRed. The same family is also treated via iterated 1-form intersections in Section 17.1 using the two-fold Baikov representation.
Massless sunrise (sunset) with 3 propagators and one massive external momentum K^2=s. Closed-form in Gamma functions. 1 master integral.

Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I_{1,1,1}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=1, b=1, c=1 (both v_L and v_R carry external legs); 2-point integral, planar (b=1). Geometry: 1 ISP; max cut ∫dz/(√Q_2(z)·√P_2(z)); elliptic curve (§3.4 Type 1.3)
